name: GOLFTEC Foster City
address: 1031 E Hillsdale Blvd Suite D, Foster City, CA 94404
about: GOLFTEC Foster City is a high-tech training studio focused on golf instruction, club fitting, and practice. Utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion tracking, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, the facility offers data-driven lessons and practice sessions for golfers of all levels. It provides a structured environment for skill improvement through personalized coaching and detailed swing feedback, with an integrated pro shop for purchasing custom-fit clubs and gear at competitive prices.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology for precise feedback
Comprehensive club fitting services with launch monitors and shaft optimization
Indoor practice bays equipped with advanced launch monitors and video feedback systems
Certified PGA coaches providing personalized improvement plans

food_and_drink.notes: No information about food services available.
No information about alcohol services available.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end radar launch monitor used for lessons and fittings
Launch monitor technology mentioned in practice and training contexts

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs for use during lessons and fittings. They offer custom club fitting services where you can purchase new clubs tailored to your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at GOLFTEC Foster City, so it's unclear outside food is permitted. The facility focuses on golf instruction and practice.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Since GOLFTEC is an indoor training facility, not a traditional course, playing 18 holes depends on simulator usage. Practice sessions and lessons are typically structured by time rather than hole count.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and has technology that helps juniors see and understand their progress, making it suitable for young golfers.
